titleStmt.title: SII 33.89: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 89. (A.R. No. 11 of 1948.) Jūṭūru, Tadpatri Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: Stone lying near the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated in Śaka 1470, Kīlaka, Chaitra śu. 5 corresponding to 1548 A.D. March 14, Wednesday °72.

Damaged. Seems to record a gift of land as Sarvamānya to the god Hanumanta (for the merit of Ramākrishṇayya) by the learned Mahājanas and the Vipravinōdin community residing at [Jūṭū]ru situated in the Jagatāpi-Gutti-sīma. Kēśavayya and Gōvindayya figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śaka varuṣaṁbulu 1470 Agunēṭi kīlaka saṁvatsaraṁ
caitra śuddha 5 mīlu śrīmadrājādhirājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpaśrī
sadāśivadēvamahārāya rājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍagā
nu jagatāpi gutisīma yaṁsthitāśēṣa vidvaṁnmahā
janāluṁnu vipravinōdu rihanumaṁta dēvariki
sarvamāṁnyaṁgānu dhyāyulaina vipravinō
di bhairavayyaku yya koḍuku mādhavayyarā
ma kriṣṇayyagāru puṇyamugānu hanumaṁta
dēvuniki sarvamānyaṁgānu dhāravōśi Istimi yīdhaṁrmā
naku yē vipravinōdulu tappinānu mātṛgamanaṁ sēsinavāru
surāpānaṁ sēviṁcinavāru śunakamāṁsaṁ bhakṣiṁci
na vāru Ani Iccina vipravinōdula dhaṁrma śāsanaṁ
yī śāsanaṁ Iccinavāri vokē
śavayya vrālu gōviṁdayyavrālu
Digital edition of SII 33.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
